hero.title: A Solid Foundation for Your Project
hero.subtitle: CFA Bored Piles • Vibro Piling • Horizontal Directional Drilling

about.title: About Us
about.p1: TOO АЛУА (Alua LLP) is a specialized engineering company delivering a full range of piling works and trenchless utility installation across Kazakhstan. Since 2014, we have executed projects of any complexity — from residential foundation systems to large-scale industrial infrastructure.
about.p2: Our own fleet of specialized equipment from world-leading manufacturers — Soilmec, Liebherr, Delmag, MAIT — ensures independence from subcontractors and guarantees schedule compliance. Every project is supervised by qualified engineers with full quality documentation.
about.p3: Over 140 companies — major developers, general contractors, and government entities in Kazakhstan — have chosen us as a reliable partner for mission-critical construction projects.
about.mission: To provide a reliable foundation for Kazakhstan's construction projects through advanced technology, highly skilled professionals, and uncompromising quality standards at every stage of the process.
about.vision: To be a company trusted in Kazakhstan's specialized foundation works market for its reliability, safety, and modern approach.

items.desc: Continuous Flight Auger (CFA) piling technology. Diameter: 400–1,500 mm. Depth: up to 35 m. Equipment: Soilmec CM 48 and CM 70. Key advantages: minimal vibration, no soil excavation, high load-bearing capacity (up to 600 tonnes per pile). Ideal for confined urban environments and seismically active zones.

Driving Larssen sheet piles, steel pipes (Ø up to 630 mm), and reinforced concrete piles using the FINAROS-800 vibratory hammer (static moment: 35 kg·m, frequency: 38 Hz). Applications: excavation shoring, bank protection, temporary retaining walls. Advantages: high driving speed, extractable for reuse.

Trenchless utility installation via guided boring and Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD). Equipment: Ditch Witch JT3020 (USA) — bore length up to 300 m, Ø up to 400 mm; UNP-100 (Russia) — thrust 1,000 kN, Ø up to 1,500 mm. Benefits: no road surface disruption, minimal traffic interference, landscape preservation.

Jacking steel casing pipes 325–1,500 mm in diameter under active roads and railways. Purpose: installation of water supply, sanitary and storm sewers, heating networks, and power cable conduits. Work is performed without traffic interruption and with full geodetic alignment control.

Comprehensive turnkey piling services: site investigation, pile field design, rebar cage production on the automated SHNELL Cage Making Machine line (Ø 300–2,000 mm, length up to 14 m), drilling, concreting with integrity monitoring, pile load testing, and handover with a complete as-built documentation package.

items.name: Soilmec CM 48
items.desc: CFA drilling rig. Max depth: 23 m • Max diameter: 1,000 mm • Torque: 150 kNm

items.name: Soilmec CM 70
items.desc: CFA drilling rig. Max depth: 35 m • Max diameter: 1,500 mm • Torque: 230 kNm

items.name: Liebherr LRB 355
items.desc: Drilling rig. Max depth: 65 m • Max diameter: 2,400 mm • Weight: 95 t

items.name: MAIT T80
items.desc: Drilling rig. Max depth: 52 m • Max diameter: 1,800 mm • Torque: 200 kNm

items.name: FINAROS-800
items.desc: Vibratory hammer. Static moment: 35 kg·m • Frequency: 38 Hz • Max force: 800 kN

items.name: Ditch Witch JT3020
items.desc: HDD rig. Max bore length: 300 m • Pullback: 133 kN • Diameter: up to 400 mm

items.name: UNP-100
items.desc: Guided boring machine. Thrust: 1,000 kN • Diameter: up to 1,500 mm

items.name: SHNELL Cage Making
items.desc: Rebar cage production line. Diameter: 300–2,000 mm • Length: up to 14 m • Capacity: 20 cages/shift
